close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description:
secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs:48 — pub struct AwsKmsBackend has no Debug impl. All three fields (Arc<aws_sdk_kms::Client>, String, SigningAlgorithm) implement Debug, so '#[derive(Debug)]' would compile.

What goes wrong without it: any caller using a logging/tracing wrapper around their backend (e.g. tracing::instrument with Debug fields, or pushing the Arc<dyn SigningBackend> into a struct that derives Debug) needs Debug on the concrete type. They cannot get it because it is missing.

Idiomatic Rust convention (Rust API Guidelines C-DEBUG): every public type has a Debug impl. This crate violates that.

Fix: add #[derive(Debug)] to AwsKmsBackend. Verify it compiles — it should, all field types are Debug.
title: AwsKmsBackend missing Debug derive
